notice_awareness.description: Data subjects know we collect their data
notice_awareness.evidence: Every cold email includes sender ID + mailing addr + STOP reply instruction

choice_consent.description: Subjects can opt out at any time
choice_consent.evidence: reply_monitor.py auto-honors UNSUBSCRIBE; opt-out ledger has 2 entries

access_participation.description: Subjects can request what we know about them

integrity_security.evidence: chat.db is local + git-ignored; Stripe handles PII; Gemini API calls never log personal data

enforcement_redress.evidence: florendo.ethan@gmail.com for complaints; public privacy policy

recommendations: Publish /privacy/ page with cookie + data-use disclosure
Publish /data-rights/ page for DSRs (data subject requests)
Publish /terms/ with refund policy + dispute process
